headline: Raymond James Raises its Price Target on Monolithic Power (MPWR)
summary: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) is one of the 10 Best Quality Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 1, 2026, Raymond James raised its price target on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) to $1,800 from $1,350 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said Enterprise Data […]
